ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the question belongs to */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the question covers */,
  "cognitive_level" TEXT /* Cognitive level of the question (e.g., recall, application, analysis) */,
  "source_material" TEXT /* Reference to the source material for the question */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the question was last updated */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple-choice, true/false, short answer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the question (e.g., draft, active, retired) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answer_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the option is correct */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback for the answer option */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the answer option for scoring purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answer_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the subject was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the subject was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the difficulty level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the difficulty level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the difficulty level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_difficulty_levels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cognitive_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cognitive level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the cognitive level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cognitive level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cognitive level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the cognitive level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the cognitive level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cognitive_levels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, student, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quizzes" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz */,
  "quiz_name" TEXT /* Name of the quiz */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the quiz covers */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the quiz covers */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the quiz */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the quiz was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the quiz was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quiz (e.g., draft, active, retired) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the quiz */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quiz */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_questions" (
  "quiz_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz-question mapping */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz the question belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the question in the quiz */,
  "points_possible" INTEGER /* Maximum points possible for the question */,
  "difficulty_override" TEXT /* Overridden difficulty level for the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_questions_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student response */,
  "quiz_question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz-question mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who responded */,
  "selected_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected answer option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the response is correct */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken to answer the question in seconds */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the student */,
  "last_attempt_date" TEXT /* Date of the last attempt */,
  "feedback_given" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if feedback has been provided to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_quiz_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_question_id") REFERENCES quiz_questions ("quiz_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_selected_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("selected_option_id") REFERENCES answer_options ("option_id")
)
